response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched video to identify intro talk (00:00-04:36) and singing performance (04:37-end). 2. Extracted song title "ホントノワタシ" from on-screen credits. 3. Simplified artist/composer credit to "Elements Garden" for search purposes. 4. Performed search: "ホントノワタシ Elements Garden Japanese and English lyrics". 5. Identified performer as Kazama Iroha from on-screen hashtags and context of the birthday live. 6. Populated scene data with title, performer, original artist, and lyrics.
response.global_summary: The video features VTuber Kazama Iroha in a birthday live concert segment, starting with an introductory talk session followed by her performance of the song "ホントノワタシ".

scenes.description: Introductory talk session with three characters on a neon-lit stage. Hashtag #風真いろは生誕LIVE2025 is visible in the corner.
Kazama Iroha begins her performance of "ホントノワタシ" on stage. On-screen credits appear showing the song title and production credits for Elements Garden.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
本当の私 知らないくせに
分かったような笑顔見せないで
近くにいてもずっと一緒でも
理解もせずに内心うざがって
今日も無難に好かれようと
本当の私 知っててほしい
Burning, Burning, 燃えるような感情
分かんないよ Passion, Passion, 溢れる感情
見た目だけじゃワカラナイ ホントの私
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You don't know the real me
So don't show me that smile like you understand
Even when we're close, even when we're always together
You don't understand me, and deep down you're annoyed
Even today, you safely play the role of someone who likes me
I want you to know the real me, the real me
Burning, Burning, my burning emotion
I'm so confused, Passion, Passion, my overflowing emotion
It's not just about appearances, my true emotion
